title: Wholesome German Cheese Salad
description: A resinous, creamy, comforting German dish featuring shredded Mexican cheese, pickles, and fresh veggies, perfect for a quick lunch.
instructions: Dice cucumber and red onion into bite‑size cubes.
Roughly cut pickles into small pieces and set aside.
In a bowl, combine shredded cheese, diced cucumber, onion, and pickles.
Add fresh dill, lemon juice, and olive oil, and gently toss everything together.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Let the salad rest at room temperature for 10 minutes so flavors mingle.
Give the salad one final gentle stir before serving.
Arrange the salad on a platter in a shallow layer for a pleasing presentation.
Drizzle a little extra olive oil over the top for shine.
Serve immediately with crusty rye bread on the side.
